sections.headline: Design that grows
sections.subheadline: I create digital experiences rooted in human needs and natural patterns. Every project is an opportunity to build something that feels alive.

sections.heading: My approach
sections.body:
I believe great design should feel inevitable—like it couldn't have been any other way. This comes from deep research, iterative prototyping, and a willingness to follow where the work leads.

My process is organic: start with understanding, let ideas grow through experimentation, and refine until every detail serves the whole. I don't believe in templates or shortcuts—each project deserves its own solution.

Based in Portland, I work with brands who value authenticity over trends and substance over style.

sections.heading: Selected work
sections.subheading: Projects that grew from real needs

items.title: Wildflower Co.
items.description: Brand identity and e-commerce experience for a sustainable flower farm. Focused on storytelling and seasonal rhythms.

items.title: Forest School
items.description: Educational platform for outdoor learning programs. Designed to feel like a walk in the woods.

items.title: Heritage Kitchen
items.description: Recipe app celebrating family traditions and cultural heritage. Warm, inviting, and deeply personal.

items.title: Garden Planner
items.description: Digital tool for planning and tracking garden growth. Combines data with delight.

items.title: Wellness Studio
items.description: Booking and community platform for a holistic wellness center. Calm, clear, and welcoming.

sections.heading: Let's cultivate something together
sections.subheading: I'm always interested in meaningful projects
